repos.name: inline-svg

repos.name: whoop-mcp-server
repos.description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for the Whoop API. Connects your Whoop health data — recovery, sleep, workouts, cycles, and profile — to any MCP-compatible AI tool.

repos.name: freestyle-libre-mcp-server
repos.description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives Claude access to Abbott Freestyle Libre CGM (continuous glucose monitor) data.

repos.name: apollo-events-bridge
repos.description: Reads Apollo event embeds from Discord and serves them as JSON for a website.
